Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Who is your favorite kirtan singer?

Other · asked by user [] · 2007-07-26 · 21 answers
I like Vishnujana, Prabhupada...
user [2] · 2007-07-26
Vishnujana Maharaj, some bengalis and my son :)
user [52] · 2007-07-26
tHE ONE AND THE ONLY......HG Aindra Prabhu
user [32] · 2007-07-26
Lokanatha Swami,
Sivarama Swami,
Krishna Kirtan prabhu,
user [47] · 2007-07-26
srila prabhupada
HG Aindra prabhu
user [58] · 2007-07-26
Lokanatha Swami
user [60] · 2007-07-26
Agnideva Prabhu has always been my favourite, and I think still remains today
user [13] · 2007-07-27
The REAL ONE AND ONLY: Aditi Dukhaha prabhu

:-)
user [21] · 2007-07-27
I also like Arjuna :)
user [12] · 2007-07-27
I still like Vayasaki prabhu and his western bengali accent
user [30] · 2007-07-27
Lokanath swami !!!! :)
Lokanath swami ki jay!
user [78] · 2007-07-30
His Divine Grace A. C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Srila Prabhupada,
H.H. Lokanatha Maharaja,
H.H. Bhakti Caru Swami,
H.H. Kadamba Kanana Swami,
H.G. Vaiyasaki prabhuji,
H.G. Aindra prabhuji,
and I like the bhajans of Bhairavesh dasa
user [24] · 2007-07-31
Srila Prabhupada
Agnideva Prabhu
Visnujana Maharaja

in that order
user [95] · 2007-08-01
HG Aindra Prabhu
HG Vaiyasakhi Prabhu
HH BB Govind Swami
HH Lokanath Swami
HG Badahari das prabhu
HG Aditi Dukhaha prabhu
user [106] · 2007-08-06
At this point... Indradyumna Swami.. sweet kirtans, very soulful and easy for everyone (including the public) to follow.... incredible melodies... and of course his purity..

The professor Visnujana Maharaja...., plus some of the Bengali/Bangladeshi Prabhus (Mayapuris, Krishna Kirtan & Cia..) and some Latin kirtaneers (maybe unknown in the English speaking world)...

However, if I dig in the collection; Agnideva Pr, and of course the legend Hansadutta Pr; regardless of whatever the story, lets remember he was one of Srila Prabhupadas favourite singers... Any pastimes in that line?
user [78] · 2007-08-10
I forgot to metion one very great kirtana singer: Sri Prahlada dasa. Like his album No other Way
Does anyone have some MP3 bhajans of him for Windows Media Player?
Thanx anyways
Servant Krsna
user [106] · 2007-08-11
servant krishna pr,

I think that in one of Indradyumna Maharaja pgs from Russia you can download some, Ill check for you... and give you the link
user [71] · 2007-08-11
I always liked the kirtans of Yadunandana pr from Spain. So lively and with devotion. He is such a solid devotee.
user [106] · 2007-08-12
At the Gurudeva.ru ewb pg, there are 3 kirtans of Sri Prahalad pr leading. There are also others of Maharaja leading and S Prahlada accompanying. This is the link..

http://ids.com.ru/eng/kirtans/index.shtml

Ys, Id
user [78] · 2007-08-13
Thanx a lot, prabhuji
:D
user [191] · 2007-10-10
Prabhupada and Hansadutta
